scripts.build: bun run --cwd website build && bun run --cwd packages/core build && bun run --cwd packages/cli build && bun run --cwd packages/mcp build
scripts.validate: bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run validate:skills
scripts.validate:full: bun run validate && bun run build && bun run test:e2e
scripts.test: bun --cwd packages/skill-validator test && bun --cwd packages/core test && bun --cwd packages/mcp test && node --test test/workflow-security.test.mjs test/audit-patterns-sync.test.mjs
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd website typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/core typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/cli typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/mcp typecheck
